title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS argues that coding alone is no longer the primary differentiator for junior cloud engineers. Instead, juniors should master fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance while using AI agents to accelerate delivery and reviewing outputs against architectural principles.
